name: open_app
description: Open any installed application on Windows. Use for: chrome, notepad, calculator, vscode, spotify, discord, whatsapp, terminal, etc.

name: close_app
description: Close/kill an application by name.

name: web_search
description: Open the browser and search for any query. Use for: 'search for X', 'find X online', 'look up X', 'open browser and search', 'latest news', 'google something'.
example: search for latest cricket scores → {"skill":"web_search","parameters":{"query":"latest cricket scores"},"action":"execute"}

name: play_youtube
description: Search and play a video or song on YouTube. Use for: 'play [song] on youtube', 'youtube [query]', 'put on [music]', 'play [video]', 'watch [something]'. Opens YouTube search and auto-clicks the first result.

name: read_headlines
description: Read and return actual news headlines from the internet for a topic. Use when user says 'read the news', 'what does it say', 'read the headlines', 'summarize the news'. Uses the last searched topic if no query given.

name: whatsapp_send_message
description: Send a WhatsApp message to a contact using WhatsApp Desktop or Web.

name: whatsapp_search_contact
description: Search for a contact on WhatsApp and open the chat, without sending a message.

name: volume_control
description: Adjust system volume — increase, decrease, mute or unmute.

name: shutdown
description: Shutdown, restart, or sleep the computer. Modes: shutdown, restart, sleep.

name: type_text
description: Type text at the current cursor/focus position.

name: press_key
description: Press a keyboard key or hotkey combo. Examples: 'enter', 'ctrl+c', 'alt+f4', 'f5'.

name: write_code
description: Write code to a file and open it in VS Code or Notepad. Supports Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, C++, Java, etc. Creates the file on the Desktop by default.
example: write a python script to sort a list → {"skill":"write_code","parameters":{"code":"...","language":"python","filename":"sort.py"},"action":"execute"}

name: run_command
description: Run a terminal/PowerShell command and return the output. Use for system queries, running scripts, checking status, etc.

name: screenshot
description: Take a screenshot of the current screen and save it to the Desktop.

name: system_info
description: Get system information — OS, processor, machine name, user, etc.

name: click_ui_element
description: Click a button or UI element inside a Windows app by its name.

name: focus_window
description: Bring an application window to the foreground / switch to it.

name: set_reminder
description: Set a reminder that triggers after a specified number of minutes with a message. Uses TTS and system notification.
example: remind me in 10 minutes to drink water → {"skill":"set_reminder","parameters":{"time":10,"message":"Drink water"},"action":"execute"}

name: create_folder
description: Create a new folder at a specific path or on the desktop. Defaults to Desktop if no path given.

name: create_file
description: Create a new file at a specific path or on the desktop with optional content. Defaults to Desktop.

name: autonomous_task
description: For complex multi-step tasks that require visual screen control. The autonomous agent can SEE the screen via screenshots and control mouse/keyboard to accomplish tasks like navigating apps, filling forms, interacting with complex UIs, or any task requiring multiple coordinated steps across the OS.
example: open spotify and play lofi playlist → {"skill":"autonomous_task","parameters":{"task":"Open Spotify, search for lofi hip hop, and play the first playlist"},"action":"execute"}

name: focus_mode
description: Enable focus or Do Not Disturb mode.

name: run_code
description: Run advanced Python code or terminal commands.
